$comment: Maps academy doc sections to the monorepo packages they are responsible for documenting. Used by ph-lora to scope code↔doc consistency checks. Update this file when new packages are added or doc ownership changes. `packages` is used by Tier 2 (change-detection prefix match). `sourceFiles` is used by Tier 3 agents to load only the relevant source — a path ending in .ts is a single file; a path without extension is a directory (load all .ts files inside it). Keep sourceFiles tight: the tighter the list, the cheaper the Tier 3 run. Section ids mirror the academy IA (Get Started / Learn / Build / Reference / Lookup). The doc-* skills (/doc-review, /doc-fix, /doc-clarity, /doc-voice) read ids from this file — keep their Section ID lists in sync when ids change here.

sections.label: Get Started
sections.checkFocus: CLI commands (ph init, ph install, ph add, ph generate and its subcommands), package install steps, Vetra Studio setup, generated project structure

sections.label: Learn (Conceptual Track)
sections.checkFocus: Conceptual learning track (foundations, architecture, document models, editors, connect, switchboard, sync, deep dives). Skip mechanical checks. Flag only if referenced package, hook, or system names no longer exist in the monorepo.

sections.label: Build — Manual ToDo Tutorial
sections.checkFocus: End-to-end manual tutorial: CLI commands, generated project structure, document model schema format, reducer function signatures, editor component API

sections.label: Build — Document Model Creation
sections.checkFocus: Document model schema format, codegen output shape, reducer function signatures, generated file paths, document model versioning

sections.label: Build — Building User Experiences
sections.checkFocus: React hooks API, editor component props, drive-app interfaces, CSS customization surface, document tools (toolbar, operation history, inspector), authorization flow (Renown auth, document permissions, signing)

sections.label: Build — Work With Data
sections.checkFocus: Drive configuration, processor interface, subgraph API, relational DB processor, analytics engine query syntax, GraphQL schema shape. Ignore _-prefixed draft/archive subfolders.

sections.label: Build — Launch
sections.checkFocus: Publish and deploy commands, Docker image names, environment variable names, switchboard config format

sections.label: Build — Example Use Cases
sections.checkFocus: End-to-end tutorial steps (ToDo list, Chatroom, Vetra Package Library), generated file names, reducer signatures, editor and drive-explorer component API

sections.label: Reference — Architecture
sections.checkFocus: Conceptual only — skip mechanical checks. Flag if referenced package names or system names no longer match reality.

sections.label: Reference — Reactor
sections.checkFocus: IReactorClient interface methods, reactor usage and advanced-usage API, attachment service API, parameter and return types

sections.label: Reference — Document Models
sections.checkFocus: PHDocument migration guide — removed or renamed exports, before/after code samples, document model type shapes

sections.label: Reference — GraphQL & Data
sections.checkFocus: Relational database helper API, query types and hook signatures, subgraph migration guide (removed or renamed exports, before/after samples)

sections.label: Reference — Processors
sections.checkFocus: Processor interface, processor migration guide, drive analytics hooks. Ignore _-prefixed draft files.

sections.label: Reference — Editors & UI
sections.checkFocus: React hook names/parameter/return types, document-engineering component names and prop interfaces, custom scalar types

sections.label: Reference — Authorization (Renown SDK)
sections.checkFocus: Renown SDK method names, authentication flow steps, hook and component exports, CLI identity commands

sections.label: Reference — Powerhouse CLI
sections.checkFocus: Every documented command, flag, and argument against actual CLI help output, including Vetra remote drive commands

sections.label: Lookup (Cookbook / Glossary / LLM Docs)
sections.checkFocus: Reference grab-bag (cookbook recipes, glossary, LLM docs). Skip mechanical checks. Flag if a cookbook recipe references a command, hook, or export name that no longer exists.

$unmappedNote: These packages exist in the monorepo but have no doc section currently responsible for them. ph-lora should flag these as documentation gaps.
